pi_items.source: task.json description line 7 and export_result.sh line 16 confirm this path

Web search confirmed VisitsSummary is the Matomo plugin module name for Visit Summary category. Task description specifies Widget Category: Visits Summary. GitHub issue #1260 and plugin source reference VisitsSummary module with getEvolutionGraph action. https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo/issues/1260

Web search and GitHub sources confirm getEvolutionGraph is the action in VisitsSummary module for 'Visits Over Time' visualization. Matomo Widgetize iframe examples show &actionToWidgetize=getEvolutionGraph for this widget type. https://forum.matomo.org/t/what-are-the-embedded-widget-parameters/29772

setup_task.sh line 14-23 explicitly ensures Initial Site is created with idsite=1. setup_matomo.sh line 267-269 confirms INSERT into matomo_site creates the first site with ID 1. Task description specifies Website: Initial Site, which has ID 1.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Matomo analytics environment where an 'Initial Site' with ID 1 is created during setup. The metadata correctly identifies the expected output file path as /home/ga/intranet_widget_code.html. The widget parameters are verified as correct: VisitsSummary module provides the 'Visits Summary' widget category, getEvolutionGraph action generates the 'Visits Over Time' visualization, and idSite=1 targets the Initial Site. The task requires generating an HTML embed code containing an iframe with these parameters and a valid token_auth parameter for external display.
